text.title: activation-tactics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for activation-tactics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running the experiment until it looks significant, then stopping.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Peeking invalidates the p-value. Commit to sample size or duration before launch; only analyze once that threshold is reached.

failure-mode.description: Testing 5 changes at once in a single experiment variant.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cannot attribute the effect to any single change, making iteration impossible. Test one variable at a time unless running a full multivariate design.
